{{Quote|It's been a very tough first quarter for us. We do get attendants, but they're mostly all from local space. No one seems to want to travel far from home these days. I'm confident, though, that the mid-year will be good to us, what with the kids out of school and wanting things to do.|Graekus Shubelle|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Graekus Shubelle''' was the [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of [[Hologram Fun World]],<ref name="HNN" /> a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] and amusement park located in the [[Zabian system/Legends|Zabian system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="TEA">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|business/13418_1.html|Leisure Industry Suffers Record Losses}} is set on the date 13:4:18, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> In the first quarter of<ref name="HNN" /> the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date" /> a decline in the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] tourism industry caused Hologram Fun World's attendance to drop. The amusement park's queue for the [[Anywhere Room]], a popular attraction where visitors could explore a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] version of any known [[Planet/Legends|planet]], dipped from several thousand to under four hundred, with most of the remaining tourists coming from local [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. In an interview published in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], Shubelle expressed their optimism that attendance would return to normal once the [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] were out of school later that year.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Graekus Shubelle appeared in "Leisure Industry Suffers Record Losses," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072939/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-11#post-6493893}}</ref>
